emptyState.hint: Tell me what you want to do and I'll take action.

quickActions.dailyChatPrompt: Let's have a daily English conversation. Start a topic and I'll practice with you.
quickActions.grammarCheckPrompt: Check my grammar and explain the corrections with short examples.
quickActions.librarySearchPrompt: Search my library for travel-related content and recommend one practice item.
quickActions.translatePrompt: Start a translation exercise for the content I am practicing now.
quickActions.importUrlPrompt: If I paste an article URL, import it into my library and summarize what to practice first.
quickActions.myProgressPrompt: Show my learning progress and give me specific suggestions.

errors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tokenLimit.title: Token limit exceeded
tokenLimit.descriptionDetailed: Requested {{requested}} tokens but only {{available}} available. Reduce "Max Output Tokens" in Settings or add credits.
tokenLimit.descriptionGeneral: The request exceeds your token limit. Reduce "Max Output Tokens" in Settings or upgrade your plan.

rateLimit.title: Rate limited
rateLimit.description: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before sending another message.

invalidKey.title: Invalid API key
invalidKey.description: Your API key may be expired or incorrect. Please check your key in Settings.

insufficientBalance.title: Insufficient balance
insufficientBalance.description: Your account balance is too low. Please add credits or switch to a different provider.

modelNotFound.title: Model not available
modelNotFound.description: The selected model is not available. Please choose a different model in Settings.

contextLength.title: Message too long
contextLength.description: The conversation is too long for this model. Try starting a new conversation or using a model with a larger context window.

timeout.title: Request timeout
timeout.description: The AI provider took too long to respond. Please try again.
